releases.label: AC Deluxe 0.38.1
releases.summary: Patch 38.1 includes new e+ behavior fixes, island crash fixes, golden tool progression fixes, and a save-version upgrade.
changelog: The new e+ fish have their correct sound effects when biting and caught.
The hercules beetle has its correct sound effect when being scared away.
The pinball furniture item plays its sound effect from its "front" face now, instead of its "side" face.
The TV with VCR now previews its animation in the catalog.
A crash that could occur when going to the island has been fixed.
The islander should no longer get stuck indoors indefinitely.

Receiving a golden watering can before receiving a golden axe will no longer lock the player out of receiving the golden axe as well. Once more, a one-time reset to the golden axe flag will be applied when upgrading to this patch version.
K.K. live performances have the proper beat tempo after upgrading to the e+ audiorom.
A bunch of other minor e+ decomp fixes have been added. There are still a lot that need to be brought over.
Since this version includes a save-version upgrade, back up your save file before launching it!
